name: Orange Cream Cake
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 12
CAKE
1. Sift flour once and measure. Add baking powder and sift together three times.
2. Cream the butter thoroughly. Gradually add sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Alternate adding flour with milk, a small amount at a time, beating after each addition until smooth.
4. Add vanilla extract and fold in egg whites.
5. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes in two greased 9-inch layer pans set in an oven preheated to 375°F.
Filling:
1. Combine all ingredients as listed and cook in a double boiler for ten minutes, stirring constantly.
2. Cool the mixture.
Frosting:
1. In the top of a double boiler, mix egg whites, sugar, water, corn syrup, and salt until thick enough to hold a peak (about seven minutes).
2. Remove from hot water, add vanilla extract, and stir in marshmallows until cool and spreadable.
